hero_subtitle: Orchestrate, coordinate, and scale your AI workforce.
about_why_p1: In today's rapidly evolving AI landscape, individual AI models are impressive, but the real potential lies in coordinating multiple AI agents toward complex goals.
about_why_p2: Each model has unique strengths: code generation, logical reasoning, creative writing. The question is: how do you make them work together? How do you decompose a complex task, assign it to the right agent, and integrate the results?
about_why_p3: Traditional manual orchestration is tedious and error-prone. OrchOS provides an OS-level solution that intelligently manages, schedules, and coordinates multiple AI agents, just as an operating system manages processes.
about_why_p4_prefix: OrchOS is infrastructure. Let you focus on
about_core_item1_desc: The orchestration layer defines the system's ceiling. It's not about making one AI better, but making multiple AIs collaborate better.
about_core_item2_desc: Every agent is an independent, replaceable module. Standardized interfaces let you upgrade, swap, or add agents without affecting the system.
about_core_item3_desc: The system dynamically adjusts scheduling based on task characteristics and agent performance. Decisions become more precise with more usage.
about_core_item4_desc: Clean, intuitive APIs and tooling from the developer's perspective. Integration should feel natural, not like a burden.
about_problem1_desc: How do you identify sub-tasks in a complex goal? How do you match the best agent to each? OrchOS provides intelligent task decomposition and matching.
about_problem2_desc: How do agents pass information? Handle dependencies and concurrency? Built-in messaging and state sync ensure smooth collaboration.
about_problem3_desc: How do you merge outputs from multiple agents? Resolve conflicts? OrchOS provides validation, conflict resolution, and quality assessment.
about_problem4_desc: How do you balance quality with API costs? Speed with resource consumption? OrchOS intelligently optimizes execution paths to reduce costs.
about_user1_desc: One person, one team. Leverage multiple AI agents simultaneously to dramatically boost development speed and code quality.
about_user2_desc: Automate code reviews, task assignment, and documentation. Let the team focus on creative work.
about_user3_desc: Explore multi-agent collaboration paradigms. A flexible platform for rapidly testing orchestration strategies.
about_future_p1: The future of software development is not humans coding alone. It's humans and AI agent teams collaborating. OrchOS aims to be the infrastructure for this collaboration model: an operating system where AI agents work together efficiently.
about_future_p2: We are at the beginning of this transformation. OrchOS is not just a project. It's an exploration of the boundaries of human-AI collaboration, the potential of multi-agent systems, and the possibilities of future work.
arch_feat_bun: Bun runtime for fast startup and low memory
arch_feat_elysia: TanStack Start server routes with type-safe APIs
arch_feat_i18n: Paraglide JS for first-class i18n support
arch_feat_mcp: Model Context Protocol for extensible agent tools
arch_feat_react: React dashboard with TanStack Router & Zustand
architecture_desc: OrchOS runs on Bun with a unified TanStack Start app for UI and server routes. Agents run through native runtime adapters, and MCP servers extend capabilities without touching core logic.
auto_mode_off_desc: Manual mode — you approve each action
auto_mode_on_desc: System will auto-fix problems as they arise
calendar_google_desc: This can later connect to Google Calendar for meetings, deadlines, and team scheduling.
calendar_next_step_desc: This adds the navigation entry and placeholder first; OAuth, event sync, and reminders can be wired in next.
calendar_page_desc: Keep schedules and project timing in the same workspace, with Google Calendar ready to plug in next.
command_placeholder: e.g. "Implement login functionality, with tests passing"
connect_services_desc: Connect external services and tools to extend OrchOS capabilities.
create_agent_hint: Choose which runtime to use: Codex, Claude, etc.
cta_desc: Start managing AI agents, automating workflows, and shipping faster with OrchOS.
delete_goal_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this goal?
detect_runtimes_hint: Click Detect to scan for agent CLIs
detect_runtimes_hint_desc: This will check your system for installed agent tools
diffs_appear_when: Diffs appear when agents modify code
env_no_projects_desc: Add a project to start managing its environment.
env_no_vars_desc: Add environment variables to configure your runtimes and deployments.
env_projects_desc: Manage projects and their workspace paths.
env_vars_desc: Manage environment variables for your projects and global scope.
feature_agents_desc: Register and manage AI agents with different capabilities. Assign tasks, monitor status, and orchestrate collaboration.
feature_automation_desc: Create rules to automatically handle recurring problems. From auto-fixing test failures to assigning reviewers.
feature_goals_desc: Define goals with success criteria and constraints. Track progress through states, artifacts, and activity feeds.
features_heading: Everything you need to orchestrate AI agents
docs_audio_description: @web-kits/audio is a declarative audio synthesis library for the web. Define sounds as plain objects and play them with a single function call.
docs_audio_integrate_cli_desc: Install patches from the registry, GitHub, or disk.
docs_audio_playground_caption: Preview the shape of a short synthesized pop.
docs_audio_playground_preview_desc: A compact envelope, falling pitch, and moderate gain create a fast UI feedback sound.
docs_audio_quickstart_define: Define a sound as a plain object and call the returned function to play it.
docs_audio_quickstart_intro: Install @web-kits/audio with your package manager of choice.
hero_tagline: Don't just generate code. Orchestrate it.
how_it_works_heading: From command to completion in three steps
integration_github_desc: Pull requests, issues, and code reviews
integration_gitlab_desc: Code repositories, CI/CD, and merge requests
landing_description: Coordinate multiple AI agents to accomplish complex goals. Built with Bun, TanStack Start, and React.

mail_smtp_desc: The protocol you were thinking of is usually SMTP; receiving mail typically also pairs with IMAP.

orchos_desc: An AI-powered orchestration system for managing goals, agents, and workflows.

step_1_desc: Specify what you want to achieve with success criteria and constraints. OrchOS breaks it down into actionable tasks.
step_2_desc: OrchOS selects the best agents for each task based on capabilities. Monitor their work in real time through the dashboard.
step_3_desc: Set rules to auto-handle recurring problems. Review results, refine goals, and let the system improve over time.
welcome_desc: Set up agents and skills to automate your workflow. Check the inbox for incoming problems.

release_v01_item_3: MCP server integration for extensible tools
creation_empty_desc: Start a new conversation to create, write, or brainstorm with AI agents.
